name: Agent Harness Engineering
summary: The orchestration/harness layer (not the model) as the decisive engineering surface.
rejected_reason: Umbrella/meta-discipline, not a tight GoF pattern: it enumerates concerns (memory, state, error-handling, tool selection, context management) already covered by managed-agent-runtime, step-budget, dynamic-scaffolding, scaffold-ablation-on-model-upgrade and context-folding. No single resolvable move or constraint. Term folded into managed-agent-runtime aliases (Agent Harness Engineering, Harness Engineering).
